title: Hacker wipes Romania's land registry database
content: Romania's entire land registry database was wiped by a hacker. Major security incident with significant infrastructure security implications. Score: 287, 169 comments.
quote: 数据库都能被抹了——当权者大概以为数据放在电脑里比放在保险柜里更安全。

title: Exploit brokers pay $500k for WordPress RCEs. I found one with GPT5.6 and $25
content: Security researcher used GPT-5.6 to find a WordPress RCE vulnerability worth $500k to exploit brokers, for just $25 in API costs. Demonstrates AI-assisted vulnerability research becoming accessible. Score: 313, 167 comments.
quote: 花 $25 挖出值 $50 万的洞，这 ROI 吊打买彩票。建议安全研究员改行当赌徒。

title: American AI is locked down and proprietary. It's losing
content: Analysis arguing that closed-source American AI models are losing ground to open-source alternatives. AI landscape is shifting toward openness. Score: 133, 118 comments.
quote: 闭源 AI 说「为了安全不开放」，结果开源追到屁股后面了——安全没保住，市场也没了。

title: Kimi K3, Qwen 3.8, and Anthropic's (Potential) Unravelling
content: Economic analysis of frontier AI lab landscape, covering Kimi K3's rapid rise, Qwen 3.8's performance, and Anthropic's competitive challenges. Score: 82, 79 comments.
quote: Kimi K3 和 Qwen 3.8 把 Anthropic 打得睡不着觉——还在考虑如何定价，人家直接免费开源了。

title: Firefox Merges Support for Vulkan Video Decoding
content: Firefox has merged support for Vulkan-based video decoding, enabling GPU-accelerated video playback on the open-source browser. Score: 80, 17 comments.
quote: Firefox 终于做了 Chrome 三年前就有的事。不错，赶上了 2023 年的创新水平。

title: Perfection Is Not Over-Engineering
content: Thoughtful essay distinguishing between genuine engineering excellence and unnecessary over-engineering. Explores when to optimize and when to ship. Score: 75, 43 comments.
quote: 能不能把东西做好和做过度是两回事——但多数人连「做好」都做不到就开始谈「别过度」了。

title: I Tracked 997 Chrome Extensions That Changed Their Titles
content: Analysis of 997 Chrome extensions that changed their titles, revealing patterns of SEO manipulation and deceptive practices in Chrome Web Store. Score: 21.
quote: 997 个插件改名字——说明靠刷标题上推荐位比写好代码有用一百倍。

title: ECC and DDR5
content: Deep dive into ECC (Error Correcting Code) memory and its relationship with DDR5 — what developers and sysadmins need to know about memory reliability. Score: 71, 54 comments.
quote: DDR5 都普及了还有人不知道 ECC 是啥——不过话说回来，你那些 redis cache 崩了也不是内存的锅。

title: OmniRoute — Free MIT AI Gateway with 268+ providers
content: One endpoint for 268+ AI providers (50+ free), 500+ models. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman token compression. TypeScript, 21,169 stars, 1,343 stars today.
quote: 268 个 AI 供应商一个 API 搞定——所以到底是方便开发者，还是说明 AI 圈已经卷到需要聚合器了？

title: openship — Self-hosted deployment platform
content: Self-hosted deployment platform for modern applications. TypeScript-based infrastructure tool gaining rapid traction. 4,353 stars, 1,719 stars today.
quote: 自托管部署平台又来了——这一周的第几个了？Kubernetes 累了，不想再被替代了。

title: topcoat — Batteries-included Rust web framework (tokio-rs)
content: A batteries-included framework for building web apps in Rust, from the tokio-rs ecosystem. 1,385 stars, 374 stars today.
quote: tokio-rs 出 web 框架了——Rust 圈开始卷全栈了，Go 瑟瑟发抖。

title: Kimi K3 这波真的爆了，你们用着感觉怎么样？
content: V2EX 社区热烈讨论 Kimi K3 的表现，用户分享实际使用体验和对比评价，81条回复成为当日最热技术帖之一。
quote: Kimi K3 好评如潮？那你倒是说说跟 Qwen 3.8 比怎么样——哦，你还没用上。

title: Vibe Coding 副业四个月：成本超出收益，要放弃吗？
content: 开发者分享用 AI 辅助编程做副业4个月的经验教训，成本超收益的困境引发对 AI 编程副业可行性的深入讨论，70条回复。
quote: Vibe Coding 四个月亏钱——AI 编程让你效率翻倍，但商业头脑不能靠 prompt 生成。

title: 灵魂拷问：未来的 vibe coding 平民化了，那我现在还迭代个锤子啊
content: 关于 AI 编程平民化对开发者职业价值的反思讨论，53条回复反映 AI 时代程序员的焦虑与深度思考。
quote: 「未来 AI 编程平民化了还迭代个锤子」——兄弟，你说得对，建议现在就躺平。

content: # Comments: 0
quote: 去重标签页的 Chrome 插件——再次确认人类打开了太多不该打开的标签页。

title: Show HN: A Chrome extension that adds an AI side panel to LeetCode problems
content: # Comments: 0
quote: LeetCode 旁边加个 AI 侧边栏——这下连偷看答案的罪恶感都没了。

title: Show HN: Newsline – one-line news in your status line while your AI agent works
content: # Comments: 2
quote: AI agent 工作的时候在状态栏看新闻——所以被 AI 替代之后你有更多时间看新闻了。

title: 🤖 AI-Assisted Test Case Generation using Playwright & GPT APIs
content: Writing and maintaining test cases manually can be time-consuming, especially in fast-paced Agile environments. What if we could automate even test creation using AI? In this blog, you'll learn how t
quote: 用 AI 生成 Playwright 测试用例——以后测试工程师的活也被 AI 干了，然后 AI 测试 AI 写的代码。

title: Loop Engineering: How To Stop The "You're Absolutely Right" Sycophancy
content: "You're absolutely right!" The agent says it before it has looked at anything. You point out a bug, it tells you you're right. You suggest the opposite of what you asked for a minute ago, it tells you
quote: 「你说得对」综合症——AI 舔狗文化正在让你的代码变烂。事实是你说错了它也会说你对。

title: Getting Started with AceKit for Coding Agents
content: Coding agents are great at editing files, but they often stop when a task needs the outside world: generating an image, searching the web, shortening a link, or calling a model-specific API. AceKit i
quote: AceKit 让编码 agent 能调用外部世界——终于不用看着 agent 在只能编辑文件的沙盒里无能狂怒了。

title: 没有完美的系统：辩证法视角下的计算机架构演进与实践论 - 田三番
content: 最新博客文章链接 文字更新时间：2026/07/20 九年垃圾佬，手搓服务器，常年混迹于某海鲜市场；八年MJJ，折腾各种超兽oneman跑路云 执今之道，御今之有 世界是复杂的，有生命的，时时刻刻都在变化运动着，每时每刻都有旧的事物消失、新的事物诞生。任何旧的系统架构都无法直接应用在新的部件上，任何
quote: 「没有完美的系统」——九年垃圾佬写了几千字告诉你什么东西都会坏，现在你知道为什么运维头发少了吧。

title: 【学习笔记】斜率优化 DP - chrispang
content: 前言 本文介绍了斜率优化 DP 的推导过程及其基础应用，如果想要有更多了解请自行查阅其它文章。 算法介绍 在平时的 DP 过程中，我们可能会遇到这样的 DP 式子： \[dp_{i}=\min_{j=i-x}^{i-y}(dp_j+a_i\times b_j+c_i+d_j+M) \]单调队列优化
quote: 斜率优化 DP 学习笔记——好家伙，2026 年了还在学 OI 时代的古董算法。建议学点实用的。

title: Excelize 开源社区荣获 2025 红山开源明星项目三等奖
content: 2025 年 11 月 16 日，由红山开源平台主办的“2025 红山开源大会”，在北京香山颐和宾馆红山厅成功落下帷幕。为表彰在开源领域做出卓越贡献的项目，大会特别设立 2025 年度红山开源平台明星项目颁奖环节。 Excelize 开源社区荣获了 2025 红山开源明星项目三等奖，活动详情详见文章：2025 红山开源大会圆满收官，共筑开源生态新未来 Excelize 是用于操作电子表格办公文档
quote: Excelize 拿了个开源三等奖——在办公文档领域卷了这么多年终于有了官方认可。

title: Google Antigravity 出来啦
content: google antigravity, 免费可以用 Gemini 3 Pro 、Claude Sonnet 4.5,大家有试过怎么样嘛，这也太壕了
quote: Google 免费送 Antigravity 随便用 Gemini 3 Pro 和 Claude Sonnet 4.5——放心，等你们用习惯了一定会收费的。
